texto: Erica's despair has nothing to do with lack of motherly love. She loved Maja fiercely and sincerely. At the same time she felt as if she'd been invaded by an alien parasite that sucked all joy out of her and forced her into a shadow existence that had nothing in common with the life she'd lived before.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Camilla Läckberg: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “Erica's despair has nothing to do with lack of motherly love. She loved Maja fiercely and sincere…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, despair, joy pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de joy e motherly-love.

texto: Don’t ever get old. With each year that passes, the old Viking idea of jumping off a cliff to one’s death looks better and better. The only thing to hope for is that you get so senile that you think you’re twenty years old again. That would be fun to relive.
explicacao: Citação de Camilla Läckberg sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Don’t ever get old.
